description.ko: 음향 주파수를 역동적인 빛의 형태로 시각적 번역하여, 움직이는 음파의 보이지 않는 아름다움을 포착합니다.
description.en: A visual translation of acoustic frequencies into dynamic light forms, capturing the invisible beauty of sound waves in motion.

prompt: Abstract 3D sound visualization featuring fluid kinetic sculptures made of light, echoing ripples in a dark crystalline void, neon cerulean and deep magenta color palette, rhythmic pulse patterns, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed textures, ECHO-0 futuristic aesthetic.
